name: hashtagCreations
description: HashTag Creations — root task runner for the backend (NestJS) + frontend (Next.js)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta -k "npm --prefix backend run start:dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm --prefix backend run prisma:generate && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.prod: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta -k "npm --prefix backend run start:prod" "npm --prefix frontend run start"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.db:setup: npm --prefix backend run prisma:deploy && npm --prefix backend run prisma:seed
scripts.stop: pkill -f 'website/node_modules/.bin/concurrently' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'website/backend/node_modules/.bin/nest' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'website/frontend/node_modules/.bin/next' 2>/dev/null; (lsof -ti:4000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true); (lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true); echo 'Stopped api (:4000) and web (:3000)'
